name: audio-gateway
description: OpenAI-compatible audio gateway (STT + expressive Gemini TTS) in front of the IU unified audio endpoint.

scripts.dev: npx kill-port 7714 && op run --account tkrumm --env-file=.env.tpl -- bun --watch src/index.ts
scripts.test:e2e: op run --account tkrumm --env-file=.env.tpl -- env RUN_E2E=1 bun test src/e2e.smoke.test.ts
